name: ga-api-client
documentation:
# GenieAnalytics Python Client

This package is the official Python client to access GenieAnalytics API server.

## Installation

```
pip install ga-api-client
```

## Import Modules

```python
from ga_api import Repository, HyperLogLog
```

## Top Level Pattern

```python
from ga_api import Repository, System, HyperLogLog
import asyncio
import pandas as pd

async def main():
    try:
        repo = Repository('https://rdlab-214.genie-analytics.com/api', 'api', 'default', 'api123!@#')
        # ...
        # access API server to do whatever you need
        # ...
    finally:
        await repo.close()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    asyncio.run(main())
```

classes.name: ga_api.tdigest.Centroid
documentation: To use in pandas df['PR90'] = df['tDigest'].apply(lambda x: x.quantile(0.9))
print tDigest would output the median
Supported Method: min, max, mean, sum, empty, quantile

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.__init__
documentation:
Construct object to send system requests.

Args:
    url: The base url of API server.
    user: The username.
    password: The password.
    ssl: `False` to relax certificate verification.
    retry: Number of retry at network failure.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.close
documentation:
Close the underlying connections gracefully. If the event loop is stopped before
the system object is closed, a warning is emitted.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.get_system
documentation:
Get system config and status

Returns:

: System descriptor. For example:

  ```
  {
  ```

  > "config":{
  >
  > : "burst":1,
  >   "retry":1,
  >   "maxTasks":65536
  >
  > },
  > "status":{
  >
  > > "created":"2022-02-17T10:18:06.714Z",
  > > "modified":"2022-03-14T17:44:46.717Z",
  > > "size":38,
  > > "maxId":36
  >
  > }

  }

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.set_system
documentation:
Set system config

Args:
    config: The config part of system descriptor. See `System.get_system()`

Returns:
    The modified system descriptor.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.get_all_tenants
documentation:
Gets config and status of all tenants.

Returns:
    Dictionary of tenant descriptors indexed by tenant id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.get_tenant
documentation:
Get tenant config and status.

Args:

: tid: The target tenant id

Returns:

: Descriptor of the target tenant. For example:

  ```
  {
  ```

  > "\_id":0,
  > "config":{
  >
  > > "limit":10000000000
  >
  > },
  > "status":{
  >
  > > "created":"2022-03-14T17:46:28.860Z",
  > > "modified":"2022-03-14T18:31:51.716Z",
  > > "size":0
  >
  > }

  }

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.create_tenant
documentation:
Creates a new tenant

Args:
    tid: The target tenant id
    config: The config part of tenant descriptor. See `System.get_tenant()`

Returns:
    Descriptor of the created tenant

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.update_tenant
documentation:
Updates tenant config

Args:
    tid: The target tenant id
    config: The config part of tenant descriptor. See `System.get_tenant()`

Returns:
    Descriptor of the target tenant

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.System.delete_tenant
documentation:
Deletes tenant and its associated data.

Args:
    tid: The target tenant id

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Tenant.close
documentation:
Close the underlying connections gracefully. If the event loop is stopped before
the tenant object is closed, a warning is emitted.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Adhoc._create
documentation:
Create Adhoc object to send adhoc request

Args:
    tenant: tenant object to access API server
    freq: frequency in seconds
    pipeline: pipeline object

Returns:
    The created Adhoc object.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Adhoc.read_data
documentation:
Execute adhoc request and read its data

Args:
    dts: str, pandas.Timestamp or array-like.
    series: 'full', 'hour' or 'day'.
    columns: column labels of frame. Defaults to None.
    refresh: refresh adhoc on API server. Defaults to True.

Returns:
    The adhoc data frame.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Pipeline.__init__
documentation:
Construct pipeline object to send pipeline requests.

Args:
    tenant: tenant object to access API server
    dset: parent dataset object.
    plid: pipeline ID
    conf: pipeline config

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Pipeline.read_data
documentation:
Read pipeline data on API server.

Args:
    dts: pandas.Timestamp or array-like.
    columns: Column labels of frame. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    The pipeline data frame.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Dataset.__init__
documentation:
Construct dataset object to send dataset requests. Don't call directly.

Args:
    tenant: tenant object to access API server
    dsid: dataset id
    conf: dataset config

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Dataset.list
documentation:
List all pipelines

Returns:
    pandas.DataFrame: Pipeline configurations indexed by id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Dataset.pipeline
documentation:
Get pipeline

Returns:
    dset: Pipeline object with the specified id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Dataset.patch
documentation:
Patch dataset data

Args:
    dts: pandas.DatetimeIndex or array-like.
    overwrite: True to force overwrite data on API server. Defaults to False.

Returns:
    Patch result in frame.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Dataset.poll
documentation:
Check dataset data availability.

Args:
    dts: pandas.DatetimeIndex or array-like.

Returns:
    Patch result in frame.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Dataset.monitor
documentation:
Create a task to monitor dataset data.

Args:
    ts: start time in pandas.Timestamp
    coro: coroutine to handle new data

Returns:
    The created task

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.__init__
documentation:
Construct repository object to send tenant requests to API server

Args:
    url: The base URL of API server.
    user: The user name.
    tenant: The tenant name.
    password: The user password.
    ssl: Set False to relax certification checks for self signed API server. Defaults to True.
    burst: Maximum concurrent requests to the API server.
    retry: Number of retry at fail of sending request.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.close
documentation:
Close the underlying connections gracefully. If the event loop is stopped before
the repository is closed, a warning is emitted.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.list_controller
documentation:
List all controllers

Returns:
    pandas.DataFrame: Dataset configurations indexed by id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.controller
documentation:
List all controllers
Args:
    cid: the controller ID

Returns:
    Controller object with the specified id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.list
documentation:
List all datasets

Returns:
    pandas.DataFrame: Dataset configurations indexed by id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.dataset
documentation:
Get dataset

Returns:
    dset: Dataset object with the specified id.

methods.name: ga_api.ga_api_client.Repository.adhoc
documentation:
Create an Adhoc Object.

Args:
    freq: the aggregate frequency in seconds between 60 to 3600.
    pipeline: the pipeline

Returns:
    Adhoc: The Adhoc object

documentation: Execute authentication.
